content:
✨ DeArrow | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Improving the accuracy and reducing the sensationalism of YouTube video titles and thumbnails through community contributions and configurable display options.
✨ Key Features: • Crowdsourced titles and thumbnails for YouTube videos • Replaces original titles with user-submitted or formatted text
📖 Summary: DeArrow is a browser extension that aims to combat sensationalism on YouTube by allowing users to crowdsource and submit better titles and thumbnails. It replaces original YouTube titles and thumbnails with user-submitted alternatives or applies configurable formatting and random screenshots when no submissions are available.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
